name: space-invaders-ai-commander
description: Space Invaders game with Microsoft Foundry Local AI Commander

scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:server

comment: foundry-local-sdk is OPTIONAL: only server.js (local Foundry model) needs it. If its native koffi dependency is blocked (e.g. locked-down/corporate machines) npm install still succeeds; use server-cloud.js or deploy for AI instead.
